turns.query: Analyze ozone formation patterns at air quality station: East Sewage Treatment Plant during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
turns.actual_response:
东污水处理厂站在 2025-06-10 至 2025-06-12 期间的臭氧分析结果如下：

- 平均 O₃ 浓度：136.057
- 小时 O₃ 峰值：235.0
- O₃ > 160 的小时数：16 小时
- 有效 O₃ 数据小时数：53 小时

臭氧生成过程呈现明显的光化学日变化特征。夜间 00:00—05:00 平均 O₃ 为 99.444，未出现 O₃ > 160；而 10:00—18:00 平均 O₃ 升至 195.25，超 160 小时数达到 9 小时，说明白天光化学生成是本次臭氧升高的主导过程。

逐日来看，6 月 10 日平均 O₃ 为 111.25，最高值为 160.0，未出现超过 160 的小时；6 月 11 日平均 O₃ 为 102.765，最高值升至 201.0，出现 4 个超过 160 的小时；6 月 12 日平均 O₃ 显著升至 172.042，最高值达到 235.0，出现 12 个超过 160 的小时。臭氧污染主要集中在 6 月 12 日。

小时变化显示，O₃ 从上午开始升高，10:00 平均值已达到 147.667，11:00 后开始超过 160，并在下午持续维持高位。全时段峰值出现在 2025-06-12 17:00，O₃ 为 235.0。高值不仅出现在午后，也延续至傍晚和夜间过渡时段，19:00—21:00 仍有多个超过 160 的小时，表明当日臭氧累积和消散较慢。

NO₂ 与 O₃ 表现出一定反向变化特征：白天 10:00—18:00 平均 NO₂ 为 10.583，明显低于夜间 00:00—05:00 的 27.444；在 O₃ 高值时段，NO₂ 维持较低水平。这符合光化学反应过程中 NO₂ 参与臭氧生成、并在强辐射条件下促进 O₃ 累积的特征。

结论：该站点在分析期内臭氧污染主要由 6 月 12 日的强白天光化学生成过程驱动，峰值出现在下午 17:00，并伴随傍晚高浓度维持。建议针对类似过程加强午后至傍晚时段的臭氧前体物协同管控，重点关注氮氧化物和挥发性有机物排放的时段性削峰。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

station_label = "East Sewage Treatment Plant"
start_ts = "2025-06-10 00:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-13 00:00:00"

# 1) 定位站点：优先精确匹配，其次模糊匹配
station_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT id, name
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE lower(name) = lower(:station_label)
   OR name ILIKE '%' || :station_label || '%'
   OR name ILIKE '%东%污水%处理%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN lower(name)=lower(:station_label) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, id
LIMIT 10
"""), engine, params={"station_label": station_label})

print("匹配到的站点数量:", len(station_df))
if station_df.empty:
    raise ValueError("未找到 East Sewage Treatment Plant 对应站点，请确认站点名称。")

station_id = int(station_df.iloc[0]["id"])
station_name_found = str(station_df.iloc[0]["name"])
print("用于分析的站点:", station_name_found)

# 2) 大表先计数
count_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND o3 IS NOT NULL
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
valid_o3_hours = int(count_df.loc[0, "n"])
print("有效O3小时数:", valid_o3_hours)

# 3) 总体统计并存储指定变量
summary_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT
  AVG(o3)::float AS mean_o3,
  MAX(o3)::float AS max_o3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o3 > 160 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS o3_exceedance_hours,
  MIN(o3)::float AS min_o3,
  STDDEV_POP(o3)::float AS std_o3,
  COUNT(*)::int AS valid_hours
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND o3 IS NOT NULL
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

mean_o3 = float(summary_df.loc[0, "mean_o3"]) if pd.notna(summary_df.loc[0, "mean_o3"]) else float("nan")
max_o3 = float(summary_df.loc[0, "max_o3"]) if pd.notna(summary_df.loc[0, "max_o3"]) else float("nan")
o3_exceedance_hours = int(summary_df.loc[0, "o3_exceedance_hours"]) if pd.notna(summary_df.loc[0, "o3_exceedance_hours"]) else 0
print("总体O3统计:", summary_df.round(3).to_dict("records")[0])

# 4) 按日统计：用于识别逐日累积与高值日
daily_o3 = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT
  DATE(timestamp) AS date,
  COUNT(*)::int AS valid_hours,
  AVG(o3)::float AS mean_o3,
  MAX(o3)::float AS max_o3,
  MIN(o3)::float AS min_o3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o3 > 160 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours,
  AVG(no2)::float AS mean_no2
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND o3 IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp)
ORDER BY date
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("逐日O3统计:", daily_o3.round(3).to_dict("records"))

# 5) 日变化统计：用于识别臭氧生成时段、峰值时段和夜间削减
diurnal_o3 = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)::int AS hour,
  COUNT(*)::int AS n,
  AVG(o3)::float AS mean_o3,
  MAX(o3)::float AS max_o3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o3 > 160 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours,
  AVG(no2)::float AS mean_no2
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND o3 IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)
ORDER BY hour
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("日变化O3统计:", diurnal_o3.round(3).to_dict("records"))

# 6) 白天/夜间分组与峰值信息：用于判断光化学生成特征
period_o3 = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 10 AND 18 THEN 'daytime_10_18'
    WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN 'night_00_05'
    ELSE 'transition'
  END AS period,
  COUNT(*)::int AS n,
  AVG(o3)::float AS mean_o3,
  MAX(o3)::float AS max_o3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o3 > 160 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours,
  AVG(no2)::float AS mean_no2
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND o3 IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("分时段O3统计:", period_o3.round(3).to_dict("records"))

peak_info = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT
  DATE(timestamp) AS date,
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)::int AS peak_hour,
  MAX(o3)::float AS peak_o3
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND o3 IS NOT NULL
  AND o3 = (
    SELECT MAX(o3) FROM hourly_station_air_quality
    WHERE station_id = :station_id
      AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp < :end_ts
      AND o3 IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp), EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)
ORDER BY date, peak_hour
LIMIT 5
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("全时段O3峰值出现信息:", peak_info.round(3).to_dict("records"))
